title: Alberta Joins U.S. Governors' Energy Security Coalition
content: Alberta has joined a coalition of 12 U.S. states, led by Governors Jeff Landry (Louisiana) and Chris Sununu (New Hampshire), to enhance energy security, reliability, and sustainable economic development. As the largest supplier of oil and natural gas to the U.S., Alberta will strengthen cross-border energy ties, support infrastructure expansion, and promote innovations in carbon capture, hydrogen, and lithium extraction. The partnership aims to advance North American energy strategies, reduce costs, and improve resource management while fostering collaboration on emissions reduction and clean energy technologies.
author: Analysts Account
